title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 18 - 2017: Green Screen Backgrounds

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about spending the day (and previous day) organizing and downloading green screen backgrounds for his videos, amassing over 853 of them with plans to exceed a thousand. He discusses his goal of producing a Boulder-themed TV show-quality vlog using green screens, 3D Google Earth integration, and organized sound effects, while also mentioning plans to sell his car and work on music.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Enthusiastically committed to collecting every possible background and achieving TV-quality production at home
Wants to keep video production to 2 hours or less per day to preserve balance

stances.topic: homemade green screen movies as a market
stances.position: Skeptical that others are doing it, sees it as an underexplored niche worth exploring
